title: Software Update - DFU - Headset and Charge Case at low battery - Software update tab in device settings - Update All
scenario: DFU "Update All" button shows "Update currently not available" popup when headset or charge case battery is below 5%
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset and charge case are paired and connected.
3. Verify that the headset battery level is below 5% (e.g., by checking the battery indicator on the Home screen or Device Settings).
4. Verify that the charge case battery level is also below 5%.
5. Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update.
6. Observe the 'Update All' button on the Firmware Update screen.
8. Check the popup message that appears.
9. Now plug the headset into a charger (e.g., via USB cable).
10. Leave the charge case unplugged (battery still below 5%).
13. Unplug the headset and plug the charge case into a charger.
16. Plug both the headset and the charge case into chargers.
18. Observe whether the DFU process proceeds.
expected: When either the headset or charge case battery is below 5% and not plugged into a charger, tapping 'Update All' shows a popup: 'Update currently not available, please try back later'. DFU only proceeds (firmware update starts) when both devices are plugged into chargers.
